input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.7.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.7.5
            TITLE: worm gear type hose clamps must not be used on any fuel line.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.7.5: Worm gear type hose clamps must not be used on any fuel line.
IC.5.7.5 Worm gear type hose clamps must not be used on any fuel line.

final_answer: Worm gear type hose clamps must not be used on any fuel line.
